description: CompositionBlue washed jeans made of 100% cotton, has pockets on the sides with a small coin pocket inside above the right one, two pockets at the back, slightly distressed look, a looped waist, button and zipped closure on the front, and has contrast colour stitch detailingFitSuper Slim Fit: Regular riseWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside outWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDurable, versatile, uniquely designed and reasonably priced, these fashionable jeans from locomotive is designed for the man with a high fashion casual attitude. Crafted from durable cotton fabric, this denim trouser is here to stay and offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with semi-formal shirts or t-shirts, and sports shoesModel statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
